focus: Implement the smallest production-shaped Cranfield/OpenSearch baseline with Worker endpoints, explainability, evaluation metrics, index artifacts, repository publication, and MDE evidence.
reason_started: The project completed Generation 0 and needed its first safe implementation generation for Phase 1.
reason_ended: Local Phase 1 foundation passed the project-specific Validation Gate twice; public endpoint acceptance is blocked on live OpenSearch and Cloudflare deployment configuration.

validators_executed.name: node --test
validators_executed.evidence: 10 tests passed covering OpenSearch query generation, Worker search/explain routes, endpoint aliases, metric math, and no-runtime-LLM source scan.

validators_executed.name: scripts/validate-mde.mjs
validators_executed.evidence: Project-local MDE JSON and JSONL artifacts parsed successfully.

validators_executed.name: scripts/prepare-cranfield-index.mjs --check
validators_executed.evidence: Cranfield sample documents and mapping fields validated.

validators_executed.name: scripts/evaluate-cranfield.mjs --fixture
validators_executed.evidence: Fixture evaluation artifact generated with MAP, nDCG, Precision, Recall, and MRR fields.

validators_skipped.name: live OpenSearch Cranfield evaluation
validators_skipped.reason: OPENSEARCH_URL and a loaded full Cranfield corpus were not configured in this session.

validators_skipped.name: Cloudflare Worker deployment validation
validators_skipped.reason: Cloudflare deployment target and production secrets were not configured in this session.

downstream_impacts: Central mde should register retail-search in portfolio memory from the local outbox.
content_seeds: Phase 1 article draft can become a public article after live endpoints and commit URL are final.
evidence_quality_notes: Local validation is strong for source behavior and artifact shape.
External validation is intentionally blocked rather than simulated.

supports_mission: Starts with OpenSearch BM25 baseline before adding advanced components.
Makes explainability and metrics first-class from the first implementation.
Keeps runtime LLM calls out of live search.
goal_drift_review.mission_alignment: GEN-001 serves the Phase 1 foundation without adding unearned architecture.
